mapper.select: select ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name, ai.introduction, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release, ai.is_deleted, min(ri.rent) as min_rent from apartment_info ai left join room_info ri on ai.id = ri.apartment_id and ri.is_deleted = 0 where ai.id = #{id} and ai.is_deleted = 0 group by ai.id
select id, type, name, is_deleted from label_info where id in (select label_id from apartment_label where apartment_id = #{apartment_id} and is_deleted = 0)
select name, url from graph_info where item_id = #{apartment_id} and is_deleted = 0 and item_type = 1
select id, name, type, icon, is_deleted from facility_info where id in (select facility_id from apartment_facility where apartment_id = #{apartment_id} and is_deleted = 0)

select ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name, ai.introduction, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release, ai.is_deleted, min(ri.rent) as min_rent from apartment_info ai left join room_info ri on ai.id = ri.apartment_id and ri.is_deleted = 0 where ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.id = #{id} group by ai.id

select ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.introduction, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release, ai.is_deleted, gi.name as graph_name, gi.url, li.id as label_id, li.type, li.name as label_name, li.is_deleted as label_is_deleted from apartment_info ai left join room_info ri on ai.id = ri.apartment_id and ri.is_deleted = 0 left join graph_info gi on ai.id = gi.item_id and gi.item_type = 1 and gi.is_deleted = 0 left join apartment_label al on ai.id = al.apartment_id and al.is_deleted = 0 left join label_info li on al.label_id = li.id and li.is_deleted = 0 where ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.id = #{id}
select min(rent) from room_info where apartment_id = #{apartment_id} and is_deleted = 0
